mapper.sql: tpe.plan_implement_id, tpe.employee_id, tpe.enabled_flag, tpe.type, tpe.id, tpe.create_time, tpe.create_by, tpe.update_time, tpe.update_by

${tAlias}.plan_implement_id as ${tAlias}_plan_implement_id, ${tAlias}.employee_id as ${tAlias}_employee_id, ${tAlias}.enabled_flag as ${tAlias}_enabled_flag, ${tAlias}.type as ${tAlias}_type, ${tAlias}.id as ${tAlias}_id, ${tAlias}.create_time as ${tAlias}_create_time, ${tAlias}.create_by as ${tAlias}_create_by, ${tAlias}.update_time as ${tAlias}_update_time, ${tAlias}.update_by as ${tAlias}_update_by

select
,(select pe.workshop_attendance_flag from pm_employee pe where pe.id = tpe.employee_id and pe.enabled_flag = 1 ) as workshop_attendance_flag ,(select pe.name from pm_employee pe where pe.id = tpe.employee_id and pe.enabled_flag = 1 ) as employee_name , isnull((select pe.email_inside from pm_employee pe where pe.id = tpe.employee_id and pe.enabled_flag = 1 ), (select top 1 fu.email from fnd_user fu where fu.employee_id = tpe.employee_id and fu.enabled_flag = 1 and fu.email <> '@in-sunten.com') ) as email, (select pej.dept_id from pm_employee_job pej where pej.employee_id = tpe.employee_id and pej.job_main_flag = 1 and pej.enabled_flag = 1 and tpe.enabled_flag = 1) as dept_id
from td_plan_employee tpe join td_plan_implement tpi on tpe.plan_implement_id = tpi.id and tpe.enabled_flag = 1 and tpi.enabled_flag = 1
mapper.insert: insert into td_plan_employee (plan_implement_id, employee_id, enabled_flag, type, create_time, create_by, update_time, update_by) values (#{planImplementId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{employeeId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{enabledFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, #{type,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{createBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT})
mapper.update: update td_plan_employee set plan_implement_id = #{planImplementId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, employee_id = #{employeeId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, enabled_flag = #{enabledFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, type = #{type,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, update_by = #{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT} where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
